para_trans: Zonal under the Department of Women and Child Development
The Deputy Commissioner on Establishment is in the Group-A cadre.
On extension of tenure of serving officers.
Department of Women and Child Development
GOVERNMENT ORDER NO. MBAA-2026 / P.No.72 / Q.07
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
The Deputy Commissioner of Zonal Establishments under the Department of Women and Child Development is working in this Group-A cadre.
The following column No. The officers in section 2 are being given extension in the office in which they are posted till further orders.
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
table_trans: Name of the officers, their present rank and office

Mr. Varsha Pawar, Deputy Commissioner (Administration), Commissionerate of Women and Child Development, Pune
